rationale: Adds two files for GitHub Pages deployment. .github/workflows/deploy.yml is a standard pages workflow with build + deploy jobs using actions/checkout@v4, actions/setup-node@v4 (node 24), actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3, and actions/deploy-pages@v4 with the correct pages/id-token write permissions and a pages concurrency group. vite.config.ts gains base: '/mkportforio/' matching the repository name (the router already uses import.meta.env.BASE_URL per the PR body). Both changes match the Japanese PR description (GitHub Pages deployment via GitHub Actions) exactly.
